BRAZIL-NORTHEAST COAST.
GUNNERY.
1. GUNNERY EXERCISES 0800Z TO 2100Z DAILY
   18 FEB THRU 15 MAR:
   A. IN AREA BOUND BY
      05-42.53S 034-45.02W, 06-09.83S 034-46.82W,
      06-03.93S 034-57.22W, 05-47.03S 034-56.32W.
   B. WITHIN 32 MILES OF 05-54.53S 035-14.92W.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 152200Z MAR 13.
